highlights.headline: Houston Rockets vs. Brooklyn Nets: Game Highlights
highlights.description: Houston Rockets vs. Brooklyn Nets: Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Houston Rockets vs. Brooklyn Nets: Game Highlights) 2026/01/01 ESHEET

headlines.description: — Kevin Durant had 22 points and a season-high 11 assists, Amen Thompson scored 23 points and the Houston Rockets beat the Brooklyn Nets 120-96 on Thursday night for their fourth straight victory.
headlines.shortLinkText: Durant and Thompson lead the Rockets past the Nets 120-96 for their 4th straight victory

video.headline: Houston Rockets vs. Brooklyn Nets: Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Houston Rockets vs. Brooklyn Nets: Game Highlights) 2026/01/01 ESHEET

highlights.headline: Miami Heat vs. Detroit Pistons: Game Highlights
highlights.description: Miami Heat vs. Detroit Pistons: Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Miami Heat vs. Detroit Pistons: Game Highlights) 2026/01/02 ESHEET

headlines.description: — Norman Powell scored 36 points and Bam Abdebayo added 15 points and 14 rebounds as the Miami Heat extended their winning streak to four games with a 118-112 win over the Detroit Pistons on Thursday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Norman Powell scores 36 points to lead Heat past Pistons 118-112

video.headline: Miami Heat vs. Detroit Pistons: Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Miami Heat vs. Detroit Pistons: Game Highlights) 2026/01/02 ESHEET

highlights.headline: Philadelphia 76ers vs. Dallas Mavericks: Game Highlights
highlights.description: Philadelphia 76ers vs. Dallas Mavericks: Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Philadelphia 76ers vs. Dallas Mavericks: Game Highlights) 2026/01/02 ESHEET

headlines.description: — Tyrese Maxey had 34 points, 10 assists and eight rebounds, Joel Embiid scored 22 points and the Philadelphia 76ers beat the Dallas Mavericks 123-108 on Thursday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Tyrese Maxey scores 34 in strong all-around showing as 76ers beat Mavs 123-108

video.headline: Philadelphia 76ers vs. Dallas Mavericks: Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Philadelphia 76ers vs. Dallas Mavericks: Game Highlights) 2026/01/02 ESHEET

headlines.description: — Jaylen Brown had 29 points and 10 rebounds, and the Boston Celtics pulled away down the stretch to beat the Sacramento Kings 120-106 on Thursday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Brown scores 29 points and Celtics pull away in 4th quarter for 120-106 win over Kings

highlights.headline: Utah Jazz vs. LA Clippers: Game Highlights
highlights.description: Utah Jazz vs. LA Clippers: Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Utah Jazz vs. LA Clippers: Game Highlights) 2026/01/02 ESHEET

headlines.description: — Kawhi Leonard scored 45 points, James Harden added 20 and the Los Angeles Clippers recovered from blowing a 21-point lead to beat the Utah Jazz 118-101 on Thursday night, extending their winning streak to a season-best six games.
headlines.shortLinkText: Kawhi Leonard's 45 points with bloodied nose lead Clippers to 6th straight win, 118-101 over Jazz

video.headline: Utah Jazz vs. LA Clippers: Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Utah Jazz vs. LA Clippers: Game Highlights) 2026/01/02 ESHEET
